summary: Complete the 6-theme system (full token palettes, AA-verified) + theme picker spec + UI cleanup audit

cleanupBacklog.where: src/pages/courses-detail.js:127 + src/pages/range.js:290 (var(--border2)) and src/core/quick-search.js:174,179,183x2,184 (var(--cb-line))
cleanupBacklog.fix: Only fully-BROKEN styles found: both vars are defined nowhere, so the Course Detail / Range list separators and the entire Cmd-K panel + kbd-chip borders silently do not render. The bridge in the theme-css commit makes them valid immediately; then burn down call sites to canonical tokens — var(--border-subtle) for the two list separators, var(--border-default) for the five quick-search spots — and visually verify both surfaces.

cleanupBacklog.where: src/pages/home-hq.js:29-35 (_renderHQPlaceholder) called from src/pages/home-live.js:120-121
cleanupBacklog.fix: Member-reachable debug scaffolding: a dashed box hardcoding 'v8.5.x · state: ACTIVE' (app is 8.24.x) renders on the HQ Home lead column when liveState flips inactive mid-render. Replace the home-live.js:121 fallback with the v8.24.9 warm empty/idle lead-column pattern, classify the empty state per P10, then delete _renderHQPlaceholder (this is its only call site).

cleanupBacklog.where: src/pages/members-graph.js:105,106,113,154
cleanupBacklog.fix: Handicap-trend SVG on every member profile hardcodes white rgba(255,255,255,.06/.25/.35/.12/.5) — near-invisible on the light default theme and frozen on theme switch. Line 105 → stroke="var(--border)"; 106 → fill="var(--muted)"; 113 → isActive ? 'var(--muted)' : 'var(--muted2)'; 154 → 'var(--cream)' (keep var(--gold) for the last point). var() inside this exact inline SVG is proven at line 115.

cleanupBacklog.where: src/pages/spectator.js:502-512 (+ comment at spectator-stream.js:63-64), src/core/bottomsheet.js:24, eslint.config.js:51
cleanupBacklog.fix: Console hygiene in one commit: (a) spectator.js:503 unconditional console.info on EVERY Firestore emission in prod → pbLog (PB_DEBUG-gated, utils.js:139); update the dead 'FIX 3' justification comments (zero test consumers of '[Spectator] emission' — verified). (b) bottomsheet.js:24 console.warn → guarded pbWarn (crisis-banner.js:154 pattern). (c) Then flip eslint to "no-console":["error",{"allow":["error"]}] for src/**, with a file-level disable + 'intentional bootstrap diagnostics' comment in src/core/errorHandler.js (61,65-69,93 must keep firing) and inline disables on the deliberate console.error fallbacks. Hook 1 then enforces forever.

cleanupBacklog.where: 114 inline eyebrow recipes (home.js:245/246/262/583/645, home-charts.js:15/105, home-live.js:30/32/219, home-hq.js:300/463/497/508/527, home-rail-newuser.js:20/57/211/223/429, +~94 across 20+ files) + 11 near-identical per-feature eyebrow classes in components.css (284,299,395,449,516,536,1012,1026,1039,1459,243)
cleanupBacklog.fix: Root-cause consolidation: add --eyebrow-size (alias of --hq-eyebrow-size) + --eyebrow-tracking:2px to base.css; add canonical .eyebrow{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:var(--eyebrow-size);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:var(--eyebrow-tracking);text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--cb-brass)} + .eyebrow--mute. Rewrite the 11 CSS classes to consume the tokens (keep cal-today's intentional 8px), then sed-replace inline blocks file-by-file starting with the four home-surface modules that render on one screen at four different sizes (8/9/10/11px).

cleanupBacklog.where: Section-header rows + 'view all →' links: home.js:244-247, home-hq.js:497-500, home-band.js:17-20, home-charts.js:105, home-rail-newuser.js:57/66/99, chat.js:78
cleanupBacklog.fix: Add .sec-head{display:flex;align-items:baseline;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px} and .link-more{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--cb-brass);text-transform:uppercase;min-height:44px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center} (or a PB.sectionHead(label,route,linkText) renderer in src/core). Replaces 5 divergent recipes for the most-tapped home affordance AND fixes its current 9-10px sub-44pt touch-target violations.

cleanupBacklog.where: Inline stat tiles + display numbers: roundhistory.js:52-54, courses-detail.js:252-261/283, records.js:97-114, playnow-scoring.js:311-320; repo-wide 9 different inline display-value px sizes (22x13, 24x8, 20x6, 28x3, 32x4, 42-60 one-offs)
cleanupBacklog.fix: Adopt the existing .stat-box/.stat-val/.stat-label family (components.css:653-655) at all four rebuild sites; add modifier classes (.stat-val--ink/.stat-val--alert) instead of inline color; add --text-display:32px + use --text-5xl for intentional hero numbers (aces.js:19). Skip members.js:720-730 (html2canvas share card, exempt).

cleanupBacklog.where: Inline card shells + padding drift: range.js:66/72/86, roundhistory.js:52-54, trips.js, playnow-scoring.js, members.js, members-detail.js (7 shell-rebuild sites); 8 distinct inner-padding pairs repo-wide (14x16 x21, 12x16 x17, 10x12 x14, plus 5 accidental one-offs)
cleanupBacklog.fix: Replace inline 'background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius)' with class="card" (restores the .card hover/active transitions these copies silently miss) and inner padded divs with .card-body; add one sanctioned .card-body--snug{padding:10px 12px}; eliminate the 12x14/10x14/11x13 one-offs. Done when grep for the shell string in src/pages hits 0.

cleanupBacklog.where: Accent-tint literals: home-rail-newuser.js:290 (brass banner), rounds.js:146 (PR badge gold), playnow-scoring.js:393 (Finish Round color:#fff), components.css:3537/3541/3676-3677 (tournament ok/warn/error states)
cleanupBacklog.fix: One mechanical tokenize-tints commit: banner → rgba(var(--cb-brass-rgb),.08/.15); PR badge → rgba(var(--gold-rgb),.16); Finish Round text → var(--cb-chalk) (on-accent token, components.css:922 precedent); tournament states → rgba(var(--cb-moss-rgb),.1) / rgba(var(--cb-brass-rgb),.12) / rgba(var(--cb-claret-rgb),.08/.25). All tuples exist; --cb-brass-rgb becomes per-theme in the theme-css commit, so these now re-theme correctly.

cleanupBacklog.where: src/styles/components.css:2669,2697 (.rr-sidebar hovers) + src/pages/members-detail.js:57 (avatar shadow)
cleanupBacklog.fix: Adopt the new --cb-ink-rgb token (ships in theme-css commit): hovers → background:rgba(var(--cb-ink-rgb),.04) (currently a literal dark tint that would vanish on any dark-surface palette); avatar shadow → var(--shadow-soft) composed with the equipped-ring glow ((_profGlow ? _profGlow + ',' : '') + 'var(--shadow-soft)').
Point all four already-drifted overlay literals at background:var(--scrim) (token ships in theme-css commit, derives from per-theme --cb-ink-rgb).

cleanupBacklog.where: src/pages/members-detail.js — 141 style= attributes; tiny-caps labels at 8px (:130,:167), 9px (:162,:325,:661), 10px (:346) with 2 trackings, some in the same card
cleanupBacklog.fix: Single-page pass on the most-visited profile surface: apply .stat-label / .eyebrow--mute to all six micro-label sites; pick 9px/.5px as the one profile micro-label spec; one sed pass over the 'font-size:(8|9|10)px;color:var(--muted)...letter-spacing' patterns; V1 vision-verify the profile card stack after.

cleanupBacklog.where: Hand-rolled empty states: rounds.js:888, home.js:729, awards.js:131, courses.js:162, +~15 more (seasonrecap, dms, drills, trips, scramble, merch...)
cleanupBacklog.fix: Adopt the existing .empty/.empty-icon/.empty-text family (components.css:422-424) everywhere; extend once with .empty__eyebrow for the v8.24.9 warm-copy eyebrow line instead of re-inlining per page. Protects the warm-empty-states ship from per-page drift (12-30px paddings, 10-13px fonts today).

cleanupBacklog.where: Field/section labels: range.js:66/72/86/223/279 (9px) vs range.js:288/299/308 (identical at 10px), records.js:34/97/107, courses-detail.js:116
cleanupBacklog.fix: Add .form-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:6px}; replace all 8 range.js sites + records + courses-detail (one sed pass per file). Kills the two-sizes-on-one-scrolling-screen inconsistency.

cleanupBacklog.where: Hole-dot palette triplicated: feed.js:182-186, roundhistory.js:90-94, roundhistory.js:167-174
cleanupBacklog.fix: Extract one shared constant + helper in src/core/utils.js: PB.HOLE_DOT_COLORS={eagle:'#FFD700',birdie:'#4CAF50',par:'#888888',bogey:'#F59E42',double:'#E53935',noData:'#444'} + holeDotColor(diff), commented as the CLAUDE.md Visual Reference exception; consume from all three ladders. Prevents legend-vs-dots truth drift between Feed and Round History.

cleanupBacklog.where: 90 hardcoded border-radius px values across src/pages (4px x25, 8px x17, 6px x17, 3px x7, 12px x6, 10px x6, 20px x4, 14px x4, 2/16/18px stragglers) vs 61 tokenized
cleanupBacklog.fix: Mechanical sed pass to the radius scale (4→--radius-sm, 6→--radius-md, 10→--radius-lg, 14→--radius-xl, 20→--radius-2xl); manually adjudicate the eleven 2/3/16/18px stragglers; replace the three var(--r-pill,999px) phantoms with var(--radius-pill); add a regen-script lint flagging new 'border-radius:[0-9]' in src/pages.

cleanupBacklog.where: src/pages/home-charts.js:270 — stale 'TODO v1.x: upgrade to loadHomeActivityFeed'
cleanupBacklog.fix: The blocker shipped (src/core/router-activity-feed.js:83). Implement the upgrade: HQ compact activity feed consumes loadHomeActivityFeed instead of the poorer synchronous PB.getRounds()-last-30 set; delete the TODO. Also fix the sibling meaningless 'v1.x' label at home-band.js:247 (real backlog ID or delete).

cleanupBacklog.where: src/pages/home.js:37-81 (_currentBand/_bindHQResize + self-contradicting DEPRECATED block) + src/core/page-shell.js:50-61 (duplicated BREAKPOINTS, 'MUST match exactly') + home-hq.js:23-25 tombstone
cleanupBacklog.fix: Decide it now: diff _renderHQHomeBanded output across bands. If band-identical, delete _bindHQResize/_hqResizeBound/_hqLastBand/_currentBand and the Router.go full re-render flash on desktop resize; else keep the listener, delegate _currentBand to PB.pageShell, and rewrite the comment dropping the removed-_renderHQGridInner references. Delete the 3-line tombstone (git log -S preserves provenance). Also delete the grantThemeUnlock stub in theme.js:167-175/187 once the picker ships reading unlockedThemes (grant flow is 0d-ii's to add back).

cleanupBacklog.where: Legacy gray split: var(--muted) x335 + var(--muted2) x90 vs var(--cb-mute*) x97 in src/pages; alias-shim fragility at base.css:281-341
cleanupBacklog.fix: Aliases are already correctly mapped (--muted→--cb-mute, --muted2→--cb-mute-2), and the theme-css commit makes --cb-mute-2 per-theme — so colors unify with zero page edits. Remaining: add the documentElement invariant comment at base.css:281 (theme.js:60 attachment must never move to <body> or ~1,450 refs freeze), simplify dead fallback chains var(--cb-moss, var(--success,#4ea669)) at members-detail.js:421 + rounds.js:138 to plain var(--cb-moss), and migrate pages to --cb-* opportunistically during ranks 5/12 passes.

cleanupBacklog.where: Low-tier sweep: CLAUDE.md 'No hardcoded colors' exception list; shop.js:199 PREVIEW label; base.css:805 sunlight --svg-stroke rule; courses.js:199/226/237/379 search-status recipes
cleanupBacklog.fix: (a) One-line CLAUDE.md amendment extending exceptions to: shop cosmetics data + cosmetic CSS effects, theme-preview swatches, trophy palette allowlist — stops every future audit re-flagging them. (b) shop PREVIEW label: add text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.45) or a dark pill so it reads on light cosmetics. (c) Sunlight svg rule currently forces uniform 2.5px strokes — delete until icons opt in via per-element --svg-stroke; consider migrating sunlight to a separate data-sunlight attribute so it stops stomping the palette theme. (d) Collapse the four 9px search-status recipes into .search-status + .eyebrow.

final.shipOrder:
RECOMMENDED COMMIT SEQUENCE (each commit runs the full per-feature loop: produce → test → staging → re-test → prod, per the proven parbaughs-ship-cycle; version bump + sw.js CACHE_NAME bump + Hook 5 sync on every member-visible commit).

COMMIT 1 — feat(theme): complete all 6 [data-theme] palettes + legacy var bridge (base.css ONLY)
Why first: (a) It is pure additive CSS — zero JS risk, trivially revertable, clean bisect. (b) It instantly fixes 7 silent var() failures app-wide via the bridge (--border2 separators that do not render, borderless Cmd-K panel, frozen brass-faint progress track, never-firing --cb-warn, phantom --r-pill) before any call-site work. (c) It is a HARD PREREQUISITE for the picker: today bourbon_room/champion_sunday/course_record have only 11 of ~31 live tokens themed — exposing the picker first would ship members into the mixed-palette state the audit documented (warm --cb-mute beside default sage --cb-mute-2 on the same card, clubhouse-frozen brass tints). (d) The AA-safe --cb-mute values ride this commit because they come from the same verified table and re-deriving mute-2/-3 later would churn every block twice.
Risk notes: This is the highest-blast-radius commit of the set — it changes secondary-text color in all 6 themes (legally motivated, WCAG AA) and re-bases --border-default for 201 consumers. Per AMD-015 + the SYSTEMIC-mute-ramp-aa doc, the mute darkening is taste-adjacent: ship to staging, run the visual-regression baselines + full E2E (3 viewports), capture all 6 themes on Home/Profile/Settings/Feed (V1), and get Founder visual sign-off on staging BEFORE prod. Derived ramp tokens (ink-2, mute-2/-3, brass family per theme) are computed from clubhouse ratios, not hand-tuned — the vision pass is the gate that catches any ugly derivation (P2: emulate → vision-verify → apply). Note the twilight/champion --cb-brass-3 values cap at R=255 (live-pulse accent) — verify the pulse still reads as brass, not neon, in captures.

COMMIT 2 — feat(settings): theme picker (settings.js + theme.js sunlight-aware patches + components.css .theme-row family + E2E flow test)
Why second: depends on Commit 1's complete palettes; also retires the stale _themePreviews swatch data (audit item) by replacing it with swatches that mirror the new blocks. The theme.js applyTheme/getCurrentTheme patches MUST land in this commit, not later — without them, picking a theme while Sunlight mode is on silently kills sunlight while pb_sunlight=1 persists (state desync). No Firestore rules change (members/{uid}.theme is an existing self-write), so no AMD-018 gate. Caddy Notes entry required (member-visible). E2E: persistence, locked-tap, sunlight-coexistence.
Risk notes: bourbon_room becomes visible-locked to all members for the first time (hidden_until_unlocked:false) — the lock-hint copy is the only unlock promise we make; it stays mechanism-vague on purpose because the 0d-ii grant flow is unbuilt. unlockedThemes read defaults to [] safely.

COMMIT 3 — fix(ui): P0 cleanup batch (backlog ranks 1-4)
Broken --border2/--cb-line call sites to canonical tokens, _renderHQPlaceholder removal + warm idle fallback, members-graph white-literal SVG tokens, console hygiene (spectator pbLog + bottomsheet pbWarn + eslint no-console flip with errorHandler exemptions). Why third: all four are small, independent, member-visible-or-prod-noise fixes that need the bridge tokens from Commit 1 in place and benefit from the eslint flip landing AFTER the console fixes. Each is a targeted edit with its own verify; the eslint change makes Hook 1 the permanent regression guard.

COMMITS 4-7 — refactor(ui): consolidation families, one class family per commit (backlog ranks 5-8)
Order within: .eyebrow + tokens (rank 5) → .sec-head/.link-more (rank 6, also a 44pt accessibility fix) → stat-tile family (rank 7) → card shell/.card-body (rank 8). One family per commit so a visual regression bisects to a single sed pass; vision-verify the home surface after each (all four families collide on the home screen). These four kill the root causes that keep regenerating inline drift — do them before the mechanical medium tier or the sweeps will churn twice.

COMMITS 8+ — chore(ui): medium/low tier (backlog ranks 9-20) in rank order, batched 2-3 per commit where files do not overlap
Accent tints (9) and ink-rgb/scrim adoption (10-11) are pure token swaps consuming Commit 1's tokens. members-detail pass (12), empty states (13), form labels (14), hole-dot extraction (15), radius sweep (16) are mechanical. 17-18 are the only ones needing a decision (activity-feed upgrade; _bindHQResize keep-or-delete via band-diff evidence). 19-20 close the long tail incl. the CLAUDE.md exception-list amendment so future audits stop re-flagging sanctioned literals.

SEQUENCING RATIONALE IN ONE LINE: tokens before consumers, palettes before picker, root-cause classes before mechanical sweeps, lint guard after the violations it would flag are gone — every commit leaves the app shippable and every later commit consumes (never re-creates) what the earlier ones defined.

deadTokens: --cb-green-ink (#1F2F25 — zero consumers anywhere; only its tuple twin --cb-green-ink-rgb is consumed via --el-* elevation)
--cb-mute-soft (#928E80 — zero consumers; defined in :root + sunlight override only)
--cb-sand (#C9B68A — only reference is alias --accent-hazard, which itself has zero consumers; whole chain dead)
